summary: Polymorphism enables uniform method calls (`obj.render()`) across different classes. Enforce contracts using `abc.ABC` and `@abstractmethod`.
oneLineSummary: Polymorphism allows different objects to respond to identical method interfaces.

memoryTricks.trick: Poly = Many; Morph = Shapes. Same button, different reaction per shape.

commonErrors.fix: Implement all abstract methods in subclass

nextTopics.whyNext: Persist Python data models to SQL databases.
